creator: monte@home.com
text:
This isn't a really big problem just a comment. When I was upgrading
from 2.2.8-STABLE to 3.1-STABLE I did the make aout-to-elf-build and it
was going fine until it did something about not moving an X lib to the 
aout so I control-c'ed and installed X just for the hell of it. Then I
restarted make aout-to-elf-build and it finished everything but it
stopped prompting me so it rebooted before I could fix /etc and the
kernel which was kind of annoying. Other than that everything else 
seemed to go fine.
